title: Video-ChatGPT - Video QA Display and Evaluation
description: Video question answering evaluation based on the Video-ChatGPT benchmark (Maaz et al., ACL 2024). Annotators watch a video, review a model-generated response to a question, and evaluate correctness and quality.
citation:
@inproceedings{maaz2024videochatgpt,
    title = "Video-{C}hat{GPT}: Towards Detailed Video Understanding via Large Vision and Language Models",
    author = "Maaz, Muhammad and Rasheed, Hanoona and Khan, Salman and Khan, Fahad Shahbaz",
    booktitle = "Proceedings of the 62nd Annual Meeting of the Association for Computational Linguistics",
    year = "2024",
    url = "https://arxiv.org/abs/2306.05424"
}
